instruction: Add a `median()` function to stats.py. It must: (a) return the middle element for odd-length lists; (b) return the average of the two middle elements for even-length lists; (c) work on unsorted input; (d) raise ValueError on an empty list; (e) NOT mutate the caller's input list. Do not change `mean()`. All tests in tests/test_stats.py must pass.
calibration_note: Hardened 2026-04-25 (option 3). Added: input-mutation check (most common gotcha — values.sort() vs sorted()), duplicates-counted check, two-element-average sanity. See docs/PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md §28.2.
